name: openstreetmap
description: Live OpenStreetMap data for any city in the world via OSMnx or Overpass API.
notes: Always include country in place name (e.g. 'Mumbai, India'). Call .reset_index() after ox.features_from_place(). For POIs and polylines use Overpass API — faster than OSMnx. For boundaries use OSMnx geocode_to_gdf.

available_features.admin_boundaries: City/ward/district boundaries — ox.geocode_to_gdf() or Overpass boundary=administrative
available_features.hospitals: Hospitals, clinics — Overpass amenity=hospital|clinic|doctors (FASTER than OSMnx)
available_features.parks_greenspace: Parks, forests — Overpass leisure=park or landuse=forest
available_features.water_bodies: Lakes, rivers — Overpass natural=water or waterway=river
available_features.transit: Bus stops, metro — Overpass public_transport=stop_position or highway=bus_stop
available_features.commercial: Shops, restaurants — Overpass shop=* or amenity=restaurant

code_templates.boundaries:
import osmnx as ox
import geopandas as gpd
from shapely.validation import make_valid
import warnings; warnings.filterwarnings('ignore')

def download_data():
    global result
    city_gdf = ox.geocode_to_gdf('{place}')
    city_gdf['geometry'] = city_gdf['geometry'].apply(make_valid)
    result = city_gdf.to_crs('EPSG:4326')

download_data()
code_templates.hospitals_overpass:
import requests
import geopandas as gpd
import pandas as pd
from shapely.geometry import Point
import warnings; warnings.filterwarnings('ignore')

def download_data():
    global result
    import requests as _req
    nom = _req.get('https://nominatim.openstreetmap.org/search', params={'q': '{place}', 'format': 'json', 'limit': 1, 'accept-language': 'en'}, headers={'User-Agent': 'GoAI/1.0'}, timeout=10).json()
    if not nom:
        raise ValueError('Nominatim: no result for {place}')
    bb = nom[0]['boundingbox']
    s, w, n, e = float(bb[0]), float(bb[2]), float(bb[1]), float(bb[3])
    cy, cx = float(nom[0]['lat']), float(nom[0]['lon'])
    _ms = 1.5
    if (n - s) > _ms or (e - w) > _ms:
        s, n = cy - _ms/2, cy + _ms/2
        w, e = cx - _ms/2, cx + _ms/2
    bbox = '%s,%s,%s,%s' % (s, w, n, e)
    overpass_query = '[out:json][timeout:60];(nwr[amenity~"hospital|clinic|doctors"](%s););out center;' % bbox
    data = None
    import time as _t
    for _attempt in range(3):
        for _ep in ['https://overpass-api.de/api/interpreter', 'https://overpass.kumi.systems/api/interpreter']:
            try:
                _r = requests.post(_ep, data={'data': overpass_query}, headers={'User-Agent': 'GoAI/1.0'}, timeout=60)
                if _r.status_code == 200:
                    data = _r.json()
                    break
            except Exception:
                continue
        if data:
            break
        _t.sleep(2)
    if data is None:
        raise ValueError('Overpass unreachable for {city_name}')
    rows = []
    for el in data.get('elements', []):
        lat = el.get('lat') or el.get('center', {}).get('lat')
        lon = el.get('lon') or el.get('center', {}).get('lon')
        if lat and lon:
            rows.append({'amenity': el.get('tags', {}).get('amenity', 'hospital'), 'name': el.get('tags', {}).get('name', ''), 'geometry': Point(lon, lat)})
    result = gpd.GeoDataFrame(rows, crs='EPSG:4326') if rows else gpd.GeoDataFrame(columns=['amenity','name','geometry'], geometry='geometry', crs='EPSG:4326')

download_data()
code_templates.greenspace:
import osmnx as ox
import geopandas as gpd
from shapely.validation import make_valid
import warnings; warnings.filterwarnings('ignore')

def download_data():
    global result
    tags = {'leisure': 'park', 'landuse': ['forest', 'grass', 'recreation_ground', 'meadow']}
    gdf = ox.features_from_place('{place}', tags)
    gdf = gdf.reset_index()
    gdf = gdf[gdf.geometry.geom_type.isin(['Polygon', 'MultiPolygon'])].copy()
    gdf['geometry'] = gdf['geometry'].apply(make_valid)
    result = gdf.to_crs('EPSG:4326')

download_data()
code_templates.roads:
import osmnx as ox
import geopandas as gpd
import warnings; warnings.filterwarnings('ignore')

def download_data():
    global result
    G = ox.graph_from_place('{place}', network_type='drive')
    edges = ox.graph_to_gdfs(G, nodes=False)
    result = edges.reset_index().to_crs('EPSG:4326')

download_data()

example_code:
import osmnx as ox
import geopandas as gpd
from shapely.validation import make_valid

def download_data():
    global result
    result = ox.geocode_to_gdf('Hyderabad, India')
    result['geometry'] = result['geometry'].apply(make_valid)

download_data()
